examples: The floor is covered in seagrass matting.
There was cork matting on the stone floor.
The carbon matting, drenched in resin, is compressed into a mold to harden it.
The Isles of Scilly Steam Ship Company's Skybus service said the matting would help to "reinforce the surface".
In some of its neighbourhoods, houses with swimming pools are quite common, though others are still makeshift hovels of rush matting.
